title: E-commerce RESTful API
description: Scalable backend built with Node.js and Express. Handles JWT authentication, Stripe payments, and real-time inventory management.

title: Authentication Microservice
description: Centralized authentication system using OAuth2 and OpenID Connect. Implemented in Go for high concurrency.

title: Data Processing Pipeline
description: ETL pipeline to process large volumes of logs. Uses Apache Kafka for streaming and saves to a Data Warehouse.
